task: View the most recent job posting for a full-time pharmacy position in the US.
final_result_response:
I've successfully navigated to the most recent full-time pharmacy job posting on Amazon Jobs. Here's a summary of what's displayed:

---

### 📋 Most Recent Full-Time Pharmacy Job Posting

**Job Title:** Pharmacy Technician, Amazon Pharmacy
**Job ID:** 10372707 | PillPack, LLC - H96
**Location:** Manchester, NH, USA
**Employment Type:** Full-Time

---

### 📝 Job Description
Amazon Pharmacy is looking for a **Certified Pharmacy Technician** to help make it easier for customers to access their medications. The role focuses on prescription fulfillment in a fast-paced, automated pharmacy environment.

### 🔧 Key Responsibilities
- Assist pharmacists in filling prescriptions per state board regulations
- Operate automated pre-sorting and packaging machinery
- Count/fill prescription vials and affix labels
- Pack and ship completed orders
- Maintain a safe and clean pharmacy environment
- Work flexible shifts, including outside normal business hours (up to 12-hour shifts)

### ✅ Basic Qualifications
- Active and unrestricted in-state Board of Pharmacy License (or ability to obtain one)
- High school diploma or equivalent
- 6+ months experience with computer/web-based tools
- Ability to communicate effectively in English

### ⭐ Preferred Qualifications
- National Pharmacy Technician Certification (PTCB or NHA)
- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
- Ability to recognize and identify patient medications
- Experience in fast-paced work environments

---

The job posting is live at: **https://www.amazon.jobs/en/jobs/10372707/pharmacy-technician-amazon-pharmacy**

Successfully navigated to Amazon Jobs and found the most recent full-time pharmacy job posting. Here are the details:

**Job Title:** Pharmacy Technician, Amazon Pharmacy
**Job ID:** 10372707
**Company:** PillPack, LLC - H96
**Location:** Manchester, NH, USA
**Employment Type:** Full-Time
**URL:** https://www.amazon.jobs/en/jobs/10372707/pharmacy-technician-amazon-pharmacy

**Job Description:** Amazon Pharmacy is seeking a Certified Pharmacy Technician to help remove barriers that prevent people from taking their medications. The role is based in a fulfillment center environment.

**Key Responsibilities:**
- Assist pharmacists in filling prescriptions per state board regulations
- Operate automated pre-sorting and packaging machinery
- Count/fill prescription vials and affix labels
- Pack and ship completed orders
- Work flexible shifts up to 12 hours (standard 10 hrs)

**Basic Qualifications:**
- Active and unrestricted in-state Board of Pharmacy License (or ability to obtain)
- High school diploma or equivalent
- 6+ months experience with computer/web-based tools
- Effective English communication

**Preferred Qualifications:**
- National Pharmacy Technician Certification (PTCB or NHA)
- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
- Ability to recognize/identify patient medications
- Experience in fast-paced environments

judge.reasoning:

**Output Assessment:** The agent found a Pharmacy Technician position at Amazon Pharmacy (Job ID 10372707, PillPack LLC, Manchester, NH) and provided full details including job description, responsibilities, physical requirements, and qualifications. The job URL was https://www.amazon.jobs/en/jobs/10372707/pharmacy-technician-amazon-pharmacy.

**Evidence:** Step 8 shows direct navigation to the search URL with parameters `base_query=pharmacy&loc_query=United+States&job_type=full_time&sort=recent` — this correctly filters for full-time pharmacy jobs sorted by most recent. Step 9 confirms the HTML was parsed and the first job in the results was the Pharmacy Technician (Job ID 10372707). Step 10 shows navigation to that specific job posting. Step 11 shows full extraction of job details including title, location, responsibilities, and qualifications from the live page. The execution integrity status is "healthy" with no errors.

**Summary:** The agent correctly navigated to Amazon Jobs, searched for full-time pharmacy positions in the US sorted by most recent, identified the first (most recent) result, navigated to the actual job posting page, and extracted comprehensive details. The step files confirm all key actions and substantiate the final response.
